creator: rsecor@seqlogic.com
text:
It looks like in order to get openssl working you need to have =
makedepend (again which I never needed when updating on the same machine =
in the past).

makedepend requires "xproto" from X11, which up to know I've had =
"ports/x11*" in my refuse file for my port tree updates

Pulling it all down now and then I'll see what happens.  Still confused =
on how I updated in the past without makedepend though.=
